News & Advisories

Service Interruption: May 10-16, 2026

  • 6 days ago
  • 4 min read

Updated: 8 hours ago

May 10, 2026 (Sunday)

Time:

8:00 AM to 12:00 PM (4hrs)

Purpose:

To improve the reliability of the distribution system serving Brgy. Inayagan, Tuyan & Tunghaan by facilitating reconstruction of primary lines.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Inayagan, Tuyan & Tunghaan, City of Naga & Minglanilla, along portions of Cebu South Road.

Map:

Time:

8:00 AM to 2:00 PM (6hrs)

Purpose:

To improve the reliability of the distribution system serving Brgy. Calajo-an by facilitating isolation of equipment due to safety concern.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Calajo-an, Minglanilla, along portions of MH Selma Street Lower Calajoan.

Map:

Time:

8:00 AM to 5:00 PM (9hrs)

Purpose:

To increase the capacity of the distribution system serving Brgy. Jubay by facilitating extension of primary lines (line stringing).

Areas Affected:

Portion of Jubay, Liloan, along portions of Camino Vicinal Rd.

Map:

Time:

9:00 AM to 3:00 PM (6hrs)

Purpose:

To increase the capacity of the distribution system serving Brgy. Lahug by facilitating installation of distribution transformer.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Lahug, Cebu City, along portions of Diamond St.

Map:

Time:

8:00 AM to 4:00 PM (8hrs)

Purpose:

To increase the capacity of the distribution system serving Brgy. Talamban by facilitating extension of primary lines (line stringing).

Areas Affected:

Portion of Talamban, Cebu City, along portions of Highway 77.

Map:

Time:

8:00 AM to 10:00 AM (2hrs)- CANCELLED

Purpose:

To prevent unnecessary interruptions due to anticipated system fault/damage Brgy. Capitol Site by facilitating Hotspot Correction.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Capitol Site, Cebu City, along Don Julio Llorente St. and Don Mariano Cui St.

Map:

Time:

10:30 AM to 12:30 PM (2hrs)

Purpose:

To prevent unnecessary interruptions due to anticipated system fault/damage Brgy. Camputhaw by facilitating Hotspot Correction.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Camputhaw, Cebu City, along Archbishop Reyes Ave., Tojong St., Pedro D Calomarde St. and Molave St.

Map:

May 12, 2026 (Tuesday)

Time:

9:00 AM to 1:00 PM (4hrs)

Purpose:

To improve the reliability of the distribution system serving Brgy. Kasambagan by facilitating tapping of service entrance wire.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Kasambagan, Cebu City, along portions of 4th St.,Paradise Village.

Map:

Time:

9:00 AM to 2:00 PM (5hrs)

Purpose:

To increase the capacity of the distribution system serving Brgy. Tilhaong by facilitating upgrading of distribution transformer.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Tilhaong, Consolacion, along portions of Cambridge St.

Map:

Time:

9:00 AM to 3:00 PM (6hrs)

Purpose:

To increase the capacity of the distribution system serving Brgy. Tangke by facilitating upgrading of distribution transformer.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Tangke, City of Naga, along portions of Alinganga St.

Map:

Time:

9:00 AM to 1:30 PM (4.5hrs)-CANCELLED

Purpose:

To improve the reliability of the distribution system serving Brgy. Lusaran by facilitating secondary line upgrading.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Lusaran, Cebu City, along Portions of Skina Buatis.

Map:

Time:

9:00 AM to 12:00 PM (3hrs)

Purpose:

To improve the reliability of the distribution system serving Brgy. San Isidro by facilitating secondary line maintenance.

Areas Affected:

Portion of San Isidro, Talisay City, along portions of San Isidro Road.

Map:

Time:

9:00 AM to 3:00 PM (6hrs)

Purpose:

To prevent unnecessary interruptions due to obstruction of pole in the distribution system serving Brgy. Tisa by facilitating relocation of primary pole as per customer request.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Tisa, Cebu City, along portions of Sitio Mohon I.

Map:

Time:

10:00 AM to 12:00 PM (2hrs)

Purpose:

To increase the capacity of the distribution system serving Brgy. Jaclupan by facilitating installation of distribution transformer.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Jaclupan, Talisay City, along portion of Toledo- Tabunok Rd.

Map:

May 13, 2026 (Wednesday)

Time:

9:00 AM to 5:00 PM (8hrs)

Purpose:

To prevent unnecessary interruptions due to obstruction of pole in the distribution system serving Brgy. Tungkil by facilitating relocation of primary pole as per customer request.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Tungkil, Minglanilla, along portions of Sitio Libo Road.

Map:

May 14, 2026 (Thursday)

Time:

8:00 AM to 2:00 PM (6hrs)

Purpose:

To increase the capacity of the distribution system serving Brgy. Mambaling by facilitating upgrading of distribution transformer.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Mambaling, Cebu City, along portions of Natalio B. Bacalso Avenue.

Map:

Time:

9:00 AM to 5:00 PM (8hrs)

Purpose:

To improve the reliability of the distribution system serving Brgy. Basak Pardo by facilitating installation of primary pole and installation of distribution transformer.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Basak Pardo, Cebu City, along Villa San Pedro 1 Road.

Map:

May 15, 2026 (Friday)

Time:

9:00 AM to 3:00 PM (6hrs)- 𝐂𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄𝐋𝐋𝐄𝐃

Purpose:

To improve the reliability of the distribution system serving Brgy. Tayud by facilitating installation of distribution transformer and tapping of service entrance wire and extension of primary lines (line stringing).

Areas Affected:

Portion of Tayud, Liloan, along Cebu North Coastal Road and Consolacion-Tayud-Liloan Road.

Map:

Time:

8:00 AM to 4:00 PM (8hrs) - ADDITIONAL

Purpose:

To improve the reliability of the distribution system serving Brgy. Calamba , Sambag I & Sambag II by facilitating primary line upgrading and installation of primary pole and installation of distribution transformer.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Calamba, Sambag I, & Sambag II, Cebu City, along portions of J. Alcantara St., Urgello St. and P. Del Rosario Ext., A. Tormis St, A. Tormis St., Ab Aznar St., M Oyson Jr. Street, & Mh Aznar St.

Map:

Time:

8:00 AM to 10:00 AM (2hrs) - ADDITIONAL

Purpose:

To prevent unnecessary interruptions due to anticipated system fault/damage at Brgy. Capitol Site by facilitating Hotspot Correction.

Areas Affected:

Portion of Capitol Site, Cebu City, along portions of Don Gil Garcia Street, Don Jose Avila, Don Julio Llorente, & Don Mariano Cui St.

Map:

May 16, 2026 (Saturday)

Time:

8:00 AM to 5:00 PM (9hrs)

Purpose:

To increase the capacity of the distribution system serving Brgy. Garing & Polog by facilitating extension of primary lines (line stringing).

Areas Affected:

Portion of Garing & Polog, Consolacion, along Brgy. Polog-Garing Road.

Map:

Recognized as the Philippines’ second largest distribution utility, Visayan Electric Company Inc. (Visayan Electric) provides reliable power to the cities of Cebu, Mandaue, Talisay, and Naga, and the municipalities of Liloan, Consolacion, Minglanilla, and San Fernando in greater Metro Cebu.
